responses.greeting:
Hello! 👋 I'm your SmartBus travel assistant. How can I help you today?

You can ask me about:
• 🚌 Available buses
• 💺 Seat types
• 🎫 Booking process
• 💰 Refund & cancellation
responses.farewell: Thank you for choosing SmartBus! Have a safe journey. 🚌✨
responses.cancellation:
**Cancellation Policy:**

• Cancel 24+ hours before departure → 90% refund
• Cancel 12–24 hours before → 50% refund
• Cancel within 12 hours → No refund

To cancel, go to **My Bookings** and select your trip.
responses.refund:
Refunds are processed within **5–7 business days** to your original payment method.

For UPI payments, refunds may arrive within **24–48 hours**.
responses.seats:
We offer three seat types:

• **AC Seater (2+2)** – Budget-friendly with AC ❄️
• **AC Sleeper (2+1)** – Fully flat berths for long journeys 🛏️
• **Non-AC Seater** – Most affordable option 💸
responses.payment:
We accept:
• UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm)
• Credit & Debit Cards
• Net Banking
• Wallets

All transactions are **256-bit SSL encrypted** 🔒
responses.luggage: You can carry up to **20kg** of luggage for free. Excess luggage may be charged by the operator.
responses.tracking: Live bus tracking is available after boarding time. You'll receive an SMS with the tracking link 10 minutes before departure.
responses.default:
I didn't quite catch that. Here are some things I can help with:

• 🎫 **Booking** – How to book a bus
• ❌ **Cancellation** – Refund policy
• 💺 **Seats** – Types of seats available
• 💳 **Payment** – Accepted methods
• 📦 **Luggage** – Luggage allowance

Type any of the above or ask your question!
